evals.prompt: I have a CSV of monthly sales data in data/sales.csv. Find the top 3 months by revenue and make a bar chart.
evals.expected_output: A bar chart image showing the top 3 months by revenue, with labeled axes and values.
assertions: Output includes a bar chart image file

evals.prompt: Clean up customers.csv — some rows have missing emails
evals.expected_output: A cleaned CSV with missing emails handled, plus a count of how many were missing.
